headline: JKHY (Jack Henry & Associates Inc): A Strong Dividend Stock for Long-Term Passive Income
summary: Discover sustainable dividend stocks with the "Best Dividend Stocks" screen, using health and profitability filters to avoid yield traps. JKHY scores high on all three ratings, offering reliable income and growth.
